## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content performance, SEO strategies, and website optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Teero's organic traffic has significantly increased, with SERP features driving a large portion of keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [GrowthX will conduct a deep analysis of Teero's website for LLM optimization and conversion improvements](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Teero plans to update their website in the next 3 months to showcase multiple products beyond staffing](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and SEO Progress

  - [Two total leads generated from blog content in July](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Four articles ready for review, with four more coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Organic traffic increased from \~2,500 to 4,160K, with SERP features contributing significantly](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Best search traffic week ever recorded last week](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Stagnant referral traffic from LLMs, despite overall traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

### Website Optimization Opportunities

  - [Implement FAQs at the bottom of blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Add schema markup to improve LLM discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Explore new ad placements and pop-ups for better conversion](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Utilize blog sidebar space for repurposed ad content](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Consider adding more CTAs throughout content pages](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)

### Teero's Product Expansion and Website Plans

  - [Teero now offers multiple products beyond staffing (e.g., insurance verification)](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Website redesign planned within 3 months to showcase new offerings](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Current focus on existing customers for new products, no immediate need for public promotion](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

### Collaboration and Resource Updates

  - [Teero hired a second designer, increasing design capacity](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [GrowthX to gain access to Teero's Figma files for ad content](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Jakub to create a project board with recommendations for website improvements](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to conduct deep analysis of Teero's website for LLM and SEO optimization within 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [GrowthX team to align ad content with content clusters and implement testing](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Nate to provide Figma access for ad content to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a "scrappy V1" of website improvements for initial testing](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Teero to keep GrowthX updated on product expansion and website redesign plans](https://fathom.video/share/9zz1wxaPFFbRhodyCYKF5G7MA8fAdyHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
